settings.accordion_materials:
Material & Care
Our clothing is crafted from premium 100% cotton — no blends, no synthetic shortcuts. The reverse stockinette knit gives the fabric a distinctive, textured surface that feels substantial and structured from the first wear. Finished with ribbed trim at the collar, sleeves, and hem to ensure it holds its shape over time. The more you wear it, the better it feels.

Care Instructions
To preserve the quality, texture, and shape of your jersey, please follow the guidance below:

Machine wash cold at 30°C
Do not bleach
Iron on low heat
Lay flat to dry
Do not tumble dry
settings.accordion_shipping:
Shipping & Delivery
This is a pre-order product. All orders will be dispatched within 3-4 weeks of purchase.

We currently ship to the following countries:
🇬🇧 United Kingdom
🇺🇸 United States
🇦🇺 Australia

Shipping costs are calculated at checkout based on your location.
Please note: All orders are shipped duty unpaid (DDU). Any customs fees, import duties, or taxes that may be charged upon delivery are the responsibility of the customer. We recommend checking your country's import policies before placing your order.

Once your order has been dispatched, you will receive a confirmation email with your tracking information.

Need to cancel? Custom pieces are made to order and can't be cancelled after the order has been placed.
settings.accordion_returns: Please note: Bespoke and custom-made orders are non-refundable as they are made specifically for you.
